name: Broheim's Indoor Golf & Pub
about: Broheim's Indoor Golf & Pub is a 6,000-square-foot facility featuring five spacious simulator bays. The venue utilizes About Golf technology to offer access to over 85 world-class courses and up to 1,500 courses via GSPro. With a capacity for over 200 guests, the space includes amenities like a fully stocked bar with 20 tap handles, shuffleboard, darts, and arcade machines. It operates 7 days a week with hourly rates for simulator bays and offers a casual, laid-back atmosphere suitable for casual play, leagues, and private events. Outside food is welcome, and frozen pizzas are available on-site.
why_golfers_like_it: Spacious, comfortable simulator bays prevent feeling cramped
Access to a vast library of world-class golf courses
Fully stocked bar and casual pub atmosphere enhance the experience
Variety of golf-based games and skill challenges for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is welcome; frozen pizzas available on-site
Fully stocked bar with 20 tap handles offering craft beers and top shelf liquors

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators used to play the world's most scenic and challenging courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club set rental is available. Clean golf shoes can be worn, but metal spikes are not allowed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food is welcome. Groups of 15 or more are allowed to bring in outside food. A fully stocked bar is available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, 18 holes can typically be completed in 1-2 hours depending on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families and has a casual atmosphere. However, no one under 21 is allowed after 9pm.
